'''Prima''', the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]], was an uninhabitable globe of molten rock.

==Behind the scenes==
''Prima'' is [[Wikipedia:Latin language|Latin]] for "first."

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}}
